scope: External idea feed for cross-checking the AI capex framework. These are not buy/sell recommendations.

sources.note: Official source for Mad Money clips and recaps. Direct page access may be limited by robots, so secondary recaps are used only as a discovery layer.

sources.source: Insider Monkey recap of Jim Cramer
sources.note: Recaps Cramer's May 2026 view that semiconductor and AI infrastructure stocks are currently driving the market while software is in the background.

sources.source: Yahoo Finance recap of Jim Cramer on NVIDIA
sources.note: Recaps Cramer's view that NVIDIA remains central to the AI revolution while cautioning about red-hot AI stocks.

sources.source: 24/7 Wall St. recap of Jim Cramer on NVIDIA
sources.note: Recaps the idea that NVIDIA should be evaluated on valuation and fundamentals rather than a China recovery bet.

items.topic: Semis and AI infrastructure over software
items.view: Cramer reportedly said semiconductor and AI infrastructure stocks are driving the market while enterprise software has moved into the background.
items.cross_check: Validates our conclusion that hardware and physical AI infrastructure remain the primary market narrative. It also warns that these areas are already consensus, so it is more useful as a trend confirmation than a fresh low-crowding idea.
items.a_share_readthrough: Supports continued monitoring of optical modules, high-speed PCB, connectors, memory interface, power and cooling in A-shares, but only with earnings-revision discipline.

items.view: Cramer reportedly told a caller who had already taken out cost basis to hold the remaining Astera Labs position.
items.cross_check: This lines up with our NVIDIA-chain finding that networking, NVLink, retimers, connectivity and high-speed interconnect are core bottleneck-migration areas.
items.a_share_readthrough: Indirectly validates the logic for memory-interface, retimer, high-speed cable and connector mapping, but does not remove the need for company-level revenue proof.

items.view: Recent recaps frame Cramer as emphasizing NVIDIA's centrality to the AI revolution while remaining aware of overheated AI-stock conditions.
items.cross_check: Consistent with treating NVIDIA as the chain-master disclosure source. It strengthens the case for using NVIDIA filings and product ecosystem announcements as the first filter for upstream ideas.
items.a_share_readthrough: A-share mapping should be validated through NVIDIA-driven bottlenecks, not through generic AI label exposure.

items.topic: NVIDIA not as a China-recovery bet
items.view: A recap says Cramer argued NVIDIA should be bought for valuation/fundamentals rather than as a China bet.
items.cross_check: Matches NVIDIA's own disclosure that its near-term outlook does not assume China Data Center compute revenue.
items.a_share_readthrough: Avoid mapping global NVIDIA demand one-for-one to China supply chain demand; export controls and local substitution matter.
